title: Complete Our Light
summary: A Quranic plea for completed light and forgiveness on the Day when believers seek Allah's mercy.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبَّنَا أَتْمِمْ لَنَا نُورَنَا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
supplications.transliteration: Rabbana atmim lana nurana waghfir lana. Innaka ala kulli shay'in qadir.
supplications.translation: Our Lord, complete for us our light and forgive us. Indeed, You are over all things powerful.
